title: Minecraft X
body:
Hello, and welcome to Minecraft X, a project I decided to make once I discovered that Modrinth has modpack support. This modpack is designed to make Minecraft better, including controller support (hence the name, Minecraft X), general performance improvements, and more! This modpack is Completely Client-Side so you can join any server without worrying about if it allows mods like ClickThrough, Decocraft, Not Enough Animations, and other universal or server-side mods! (not saying that those mods are bad, their great! just not for everyone) It also doesn't include mods that can be seen as cheating such as EditSign or JourneyMap. (those mods are great, just kinda cheaty on fully vanilla servers)

There is also a Vanilla Tweaks Pack to go with this that is optional! the link is https://vanillatweaks.net/share#ldf04m
